title: Agreement for the Establishment of a Fund for ASEAN
text:
ASEAN DOCUMENTATION
SERIES
AGREEMENT FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A FUND
E H T R O F ASSOCIATION F O
SOUTHEAST ASIAN NATIONS
THE GOVERNMENTS OF THE REPUBLIC
F O INDONESIA, MALAYSIA, E H T REPUBLIC
OF THE PHILIPPINES, THE REPUBLIC OF
SINGAPORE E H T D N A KINGDOM F O THAILAND.
BEING members of the Association of Southeast
Asian Nations (hereinafter referred to as "ASEAN").
DESIRING to accelerate and intensify the imple-
mentation of the aims and purposes of ASEAN as
embodied in the ASEAN Declaration.
AND RECOGNIZING the desirability of and
the necessity a for fund to finance joint projects
approved by the Foreign Ministers of ASEAN.
DO HEREBY AGREE AS FOLLOWS :
ARTICLE I
ESf ABLISHMENT AND MEMBERSHIP
1. The Contracting Parties shall establish a Fund
for ASEAN (hereinafter called "the Fund").
2. Members of ASEAN shall be entitled to member-
ship in the Fund and shall become members upon
signature of this Agreement or in the case of new
members upon deposit f o this instrument f o accession
to this Agreement.
ARTICLE II
THE FUND
1; e h T Fund shall e b made e h t f o p u ASEAN Natio-
nal Fund of each of the member countries (herein-
after referred to as !fthc national fund"). Contri-
butions made by each member country to the Fund
shall e b paid into e h t national fund f o each member
country and shall be held in the country of that
member country.
2 /,
V
) a ( Each member country shall initially contri-
bute to the Fund an amount equivalent to US$ 1
million be to paid not in more than three annual
instalments. The contribution in national currency
shall e b convertible into United States dollars. e h T
Fund e b y a m increased from time o t time s a agreed
upon e h t y b ASEAN foreign Ministers (hereinafter
referred as o t "the Foreign Ministers")..
(b) Contributions to the Fund shall be deter-
mined in United States dollars. Each member country
may make contributions of equivalent amount in its
national currency or in United States dollars or in
both.
3. (a) The national Fund shall be replenished by
each member country e h t o t required level as decided
by the Foreign Ministers in paragraph 2(a) taking into
account y n a outstanding claim r o f reimbursement y b
member countries.
of d n e e h t At b) ( every quarter, e h t n i or event
of a member country changing the value of its natio-
nal currency, it shall make such adjustments in its,
own contribution as well restore the balance of its"
national fund to its equivalent value in United States
dollars e h t at close of business y a d e h t n o prior
e h t
o t
adjustments.
For the (c) purpose of calculating the amount
of national currency contribution, replenishment,
adjustment or reimbursement to the national fund,
the rate of conversion shall be the par value of the
currency f o each member country s a declared with
e h t International Monetary Fund.
(d) In cases where the national currency of a
member country does not have a par value declared
with e h t International Monetary Fund, e h t rate con-
version he t of national currency of that country
shall be based on such rate of exchange at the close
of business day on the prior to the date when the
contribution, replenishment, adjustment or reim-
bursement e b o t is made as determined e h t y b
ASEAN Standing Committee upon consultation, f i
necessary, with the International Monetary Fund.
ARTICLE HI
CONTROL DISBURSEMENT D N A ACCOUNTING
The control, disbursement and accounting of
the Fund shall in be accordance with the rules con-
tained in the Annex hereto.

ARTICLE V I
AMENDMENTS , -
Any member country y a m propose n a amend-
ment to the provisions of this Agreement^, to the
rules contained in the Annex hereto. Such7 amend-
ment shall only come into force after ij/has been
accepted by all the other member countries^
ARTICLE V /
ENTRY INTO FORCE AND TERMINATION-
vi' '
This Agreement shall enter into force n o the^aates
,of signature by all the member countries/aJiC shall
remain n i force until s i it terminated e h t y b decision
of all the Foreign Ministers.
ACCESSION
Accession o t this Agreement shall take effect
from e h t date n o which e h t instrument f o accession
is deposited in the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Malay-
sia, by the new member of ASEAN,
e h t r o F Government e h t f o
ARTICLE
Republic of Indonesia
I V
WITHDRAWAL
A Contracting Party may at any time give formal
notice s t i f o intention o t withdraw from this Agree-
ment and such withdrawal shall take effect one year
from e h t date e h t f o notification e h t f o Ministry f o
Foreign Affairs, Malaysia, which shall as soon as
possible notify all the other member countries.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the undersigned, being
duly authorized thereto by their respective govern-
ments, have signed this Agreement.
DONE at Cameron Highlands, in a single copy"
in the English Language this Seventeenth of day
December, 1969.

shall commence on 1st January and shall end on 31st

i

The (b) Annual Financial Statement shall
include n a income d n a expenditure account e h t r o f

8
